utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Estelle , you gotta get me some work . I ... I lost my health insurance .

utterances.speaker: Estelle
utterances.text: All right , first thing we gotta do , damage control .

emotion_cause.span: 2_first thing we gotta do , damage control .

utterances.speaker: Estelle
utterances.text: Well , I think uhh , someone out there may have been bad mouthing you all over town .
